title: Use slash commands for formatting in updates (really all rich text fields)

posts.author: zsmith (Zach Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Title says it all. Use slash commands for formatting text wherever text is able to formatted.

The biggest culprit is in updates. Needing to know when to use slash commands and when to use keyboard shortcuts for actively formatting text as I type definitely impacts the user experience for me. Especially since certain features don’t exist when slash commands aren’t being used to format.
